narrative:
Blendon-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,421 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
